headlines.description: — With drama swirling and doubt threatening to wreck Cleveland's season, Myles Garrett felt Baker Mayfield needed to address the Browns before kickoff.
headlines.shortLinkText: Browns close chaotic week by dumping Burrow, Bengals 41-16

headlines.description: — Jonathon Cooper and the Denver defense pestered Dak Prescott a lot more than the rookie’s first two sacks in the NFL showed.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos beat Cowboys 30-16 as 6-game Dallas win streak ends

headlines.description: — There was celebratory music coming from the Miami Dolphins locker room on Sunday afternoon, the first time that's happened this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Teams combine for 9 turnovers; Dolphins defeat Texans 17-9

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Matt Ryan's last and longest of several deep completions spared the Atlanta Falcons from another infamous collapse.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ryan passes for 343 yards, 2 TDs as Falcons top Saints 27-25

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at New York Giants

headlines.description: — After testing positive for COVID-19 on Wednesday, safety Xavier McKinney spent most of the week not knowing whether he was he was going to play for the New York Giants against the Las Vegas Raiders.
headlines.shortLinkText: McKinney has 2 picks, Giants edge Raiders 23-16

events.name: New England Patriots at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — Bill Belichick has the blueprint for beating Sam Darnold, and it starts with disguising coverages.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pats shut down Darnold, Panthers, cruise to 24-6 victory

headlines.description: — Jacksonville linebacker Josh Allen wanted his namesake's jersey — badly.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jags get better Josh Allen in this meeting, beat Bills 9-6

headlines.description: — Justin Tucker's job was much easier for this game-winning kick.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tucker's overtime kick gives Ravens 34-31 win over Vikings

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert faced the perfect defense to rebound from two subpar games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Justin Herbert has 3 TDs, Chargers beat Eagles 27-24

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Kansas City Chiefs probably scrapped whatever defensive game plan they were pondering the moment they learned Green Bay Packers quarterback Aaron Rodgers had tested positive for COVID-19 this week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiefs edge Rodgers-less Packers 13-7 in defensive slugfest

headlines.description: — With most of Arizona's biggest stars sitting out with injuries, the Cardinals still had more than enough firepower to overwhelm the San Francisco 49ers.

events.name: Tennessee Titans at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — On two snaps 20 seconds apart, Jeffery Simmons and Kevin Byard forced Matthew Stafford into a pair of terrible decisions. The stunning sequence ended with Byard sprinting to the end zone carrying the second of Stafford's back-to-back interceptions.
headlines.shortLinkText: Defense carries Titans past Rams 28-16 for 5th straight win
